main.description: Primary sync mechanism: a permissioned repo's operation log since a given revision, inlining record values by default. Set excludeValues for metadata-only entries. The oplog is a transport optimization; a host may compact or drop it, and a syncer that cannot find its since revision falls back to full-state recovery via getRepo. Requires a covering OAuth scope or a space credential; implemented by a repo host.

space.description: Permissioned space URI, in the form at://{authority}/space/{spaceType}/{skey}. Not a standard at-uri.

did.description: The DID of the repo's author.

since.description: Return operations after this revision. When omitted, return the earliest available operations.

excludeValues.description: When true, omit inlined record values and return only operation metadata.

commit.description: The repo's current signed commit. Present if and only if this page includes the last available operation for the repo.

errors.name: HistoryUnavailable
errors.description: The requested since revision is no longer covered by the host's operation log. Fall back to full-state recovery.
